arts.sum: This week we remember some fantastic wins in Madrid and Turin but April 1, 2012, was one of the saddest days for Laziali… Matches of the Week Date: Tuesday, March 31, 1998 Location: Estadio Vicente Calderón, Madrid Fixture: Atletico Lazio 0-1, UEFA Cup semi final, first leg A superb first half strike by Jugovic allows Lazio […] The post This Week In Lazio History: March 31-April 6 appeared first on The Laziali.

arts.ttl: Atalanta and Lazio both need three points
arts.sum: Atalanta have won 38 of their 113 matches against Lazio in Serie A (D43 L32), a joint-record in terms of wins for them in the competition (also 38 against Bologna). In the last 11 matches between Atalanta and Lazio played in Bergamo in Serie A, 41 goals have been scored at an average of 3.7 goals per game (21 for the Lombardy team and 20 for the Capitoline club).
